projects.title: Character Creator
projects.description: I created Character creator as my final Bootcamp project. It's a fullstack tool to create the personality of your next tabletop character. You can choose or randomize four aspects of your personality: trait, bond, flaw and ideal. I did a deep dive in auth, JWT and global context with this project.

projects.title: MyNotes
projects.description: I built MyNotes as a simple, reliable and thoughtfully designed notes app. It's a personal project that helped me learn new technologies and and deepen my knowledge of those I already know.

projects.title: Mini paint
projects.description: This is a fun little project made with Typescript vanilla, styled with CSS. It contains a canvas where you can... well, paint! You can also save your drawing if you like it.

projects.title: Pokédex
projects.description: The classic Pokédex! I code it to apply for my first hackaton. You can search, filter, fav and navigate the first 50 pokémon. It also has a very comprehensive set of tests. Data is fetch from the Pokéapi.

projects.title: BarriSense
projects.description: This was my first project for a Hackaton. It was a great learning experience and I had a great multidisciplinary and invested team. Together we created BarriSense, a participatory website where citizens can submit complaints about their neighborhood and see them represented in a heat map that shows the level of social unrest in Barcelona.

projects.title: Find Games
projects.description: Find Games is a platform for scheduling and managing tabletop gaming sessions. You can create users, events, manage locations, and coordinate with other players. This is the first project where I implemented a backend.

projects.title: Quote Tracker
projects.description: This is my quote estimation tool, featuring a services selection, real-time price calculation, and client information management. The app includes URL parameters for sharing the quotes and different pages and also has a clean, responsive design.
